title: Connection Tutorial
prerequisite: Before you start: install and open Lynavo Drive on your computer.

lan.title: Local Network Search
lan.description: Let the phone find Lynavo Drive on a computer connected to the same Wi-Fi.

steps.0: Connect your phone and computer to the same Wi-Fi or local network.
steps.1: Open Lynavo Drive on your computer and keep it running.
steps.2: Open device search on your phone and wait for the computer to appear.

lan.warning: Need the desktop app? Open www.lynavo.com in your computer browser to download it.

qr.title: Scan QR Code
qr.description: Scan the QR Code shown by the desktop app to fill in the IP and pairing code automatically.

steps.0: Show the QR Code from Global Settings in Lynavo Drive on your computer.
steps.1: Tap Scan QR Code on your phone to open the camera.
steps.2: Aim at the QR Code on the screen. The app will continue pairing after it is recognized.

code.title: Enter Pairing Code
code.description: After finding a computer or entering an IP manually, verify with the 6-digit pairing code.

steps.0: Find the 6-digit pairing code in Global Settings on your computer.
steps.1: The code does not refresh automatically. Use Regenerate to change it manually.
steps.2: Enter the code on your phone to finish pairing.

ip.title: Direct IP Pairing
ip.description: If search does not find the computer, enter the desktop advertised IP directly.

steps.0: Open Global Settings from the sidebar on your computer.
steps.2: Enter that address from Manual Pairing on your phone and continue.

troubleshoot.title: Connection Troubleshooting

items.0: Confirm your phone and computer are on the same Wi-Fi. On office networks, check that network isolation is disabled.
items.1: Check whether VPN or proxy is enabled on the phone or computer. Turn it off and search again.
items.2: If it still cannot connect, use Enter IP Manually or the pairing code flow.

troubleshoot.supportBody: Export diagnostics or contact support so we can help investigate.
